_source: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D1A — transcribed Sprint C.2 from industry-standard references; engineer-verify against published edition before runtime use.
_title: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D1A — 70°C PVC insulated, flat twin-and-earth, copper, unarmoured
_note: Flat twin-and-earth (T&E) cable. Two-core plus CPC. 70°C thermoplastic (PVC) insulation. Standard UK domestic wiring cable. Ratings are for two loaded conductors (single-phase). Always verify against purchased copy of BS 7671:2018+A2:2022.

_units.mVAm: millivolts per ampere per metre (voltage drop)

installation_methods.C: Clipped direct to a non-metallic surface
installation_methods.A: In conduit in a thermally insulating wall (Method A1 reference)
installation_methods.100: Above plasterboard ceiling, in contact with ceiling (touching thermal insulation ≤100 mm depth)
installation_methods.101: In a stud wall with no thermal insulation
installation_methods.102: Enclosed in a stud wall with thermal insulation on one side
installation_methods.103: Above plasterboard ceiling, completely surrounded by thermal insulation >100 mm

table_4d1a_pvc_twin_earth_copper._reference: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Table 4D1A — 70°C thermoplastic insulated, flat twin-and-earth, copper, unarmoured
table_4d1a_pvc_twin_earth_copper._note: Two loaded conductors. CPC is reduced-section and does not carry load current. Methods 100–103 are UK-specific domestic installation configurations per On-Site Guide / Guidance Note 1.

method_C._formation: Flat twin-and-earth cable clipped direct to non-metallic surface

usage_notes.cable_type: This table applies to flat twin-and-earth (T&E) cable only. T&E is the standard UK domestic wiring cable per BS 6004. Do not apply these ratings to round multicore, singles in conduit, or SWA cables.
usage_notes.method_selection: Match actual installation method. Methods 100–103 are UK domestic-specific; see BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 notes and IET On-Site Guide Table 6A for correction factors.
usage_notes.thermal_insulation_warning: Methods 101–103 carry pending_engineer_transcription status. Do NOT use for final design without verifying against published BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Table 4D1A.
usage_notes.correction_factors: Apply correction factors from appendix4-correction-factors.json before comparing to Ib. Grouping, ambient temperature, and thermal insulation factors all apply.
usage_notes.cpc_sizing: CPC in T&E is typically reduced-section (e.g., 1.5 mm² line + 1.0 mm² CPC). Check adiabatic equation per BS 7671 Regulation 543.1 using calc.cpc_adiabatic.
usage_notes.mVAm_note: mVAm values are the same as equivalent XLPE tables for corresponding CSA — voltage drop is determined by conductor resistance (geometry), not insulation type.
